globalRisks: fight-sequence summary drift under spell timing
final-third witness-read flattening into schematic language

scenes.title: The Infiltration
scenes.biggestGap: A few corridor lines still summarize pressure instead of keeping Jaina in contact with stone, lungs, torch grease, and other bodies in the passage.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Palace service passages and the last service door into the chamber flank.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Lye, grease, latch, torch bracket, mop bucket, shelf edge, worn stone.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads Frostmourne through wall-cold, bread-taste, nosebleed, and failing breath.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Torch crackle, blood on Jaina's lip, Uther's plate weight, hands on the service door.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The service door opening on cold clean chamber air and live voices through wood.

scenes.title: The Murder
scenes.biggestGap: One lethality line drifted into generic judgment instead of staying with shaft, blood, closure, and the chamber's impossible physics.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Imperial Chamber dome, seal, throne dais, and curtain-shadow flank.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Marble, crown on the floor, blood on steps, slipping staff grip.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina tracks the seam while old recognition hardens into a combat read.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Curtain cover, staff grip, and Arthas crossing the aisle over the seal.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Concealment dying the instant Arthas turns off the dais toward them.

scenes.title: The Fight
scenes.biggestGap: The fight briefly named plan and reaction in summary where Sylvanas's diagonal retreat and the lane bought with her body should stay visible.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Columns, golden seal, dais steps, and the lanes the chamber opens under pressure.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cracked marble, shattered ice, blood on armor seams, snapped shaft, dropped staff.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina thinks in seam timing and spell sequence while pain and cold keep trying to strip thought away.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Warnings and commands tied to arrows, footing, wounds, and column impacts.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Arthas turning for Jaina while Sylvanas rises with one final line through the room.

scenes.title: The Aftermath
scenes.biggestGap: The aftermath risked schematic or political summary unless every beat stayed tied to bodies, spearpoints, doors, and the room's false visual story.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The chamber re-read by late witnesses, then the side exit back into service stone.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Cracked blade, cuffs, spearpoints, cloak over Terenas, bent crown point.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads the room's false story faster than she can fight it and feels Frostmourne's changed pulse bodily.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Orders and report pinned to the blade, dead royals, blood on marble, and exhausted bodies under guard.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Bound descent back into service passages with kitchen lye and bread-taste returning below.
